title: Web Developer
description:
Insurance brokerage company for vehicles based in California, providing services to clients across the United States.
-Developed full-stack web applications using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js) with an MVC architecture.
-Integrated and managed SQL and NoSQL databases, designing structures and optimizing queries to implement new features and improve performance
-Led Agile sprint planning and backlog management. Improved the ticket resolution rate by 24% by optimizing ticket tracking and status.

title: IT Support & Helpdesk
description:
Company focused on providing digital solutions for businesses, such as CRM systems for convenience stores and dental clinics.
My role involved providing technical support to clients, managing tickets and resolving issues through Jira. I worked with databases performing tasks such as data entry, validation, and basic analysis to support internal processes and case tracking. I also helped with system and application configuration.
